changelog: Feature 4: SMS Notification System — new sms-engine.js (Green Web BD API, 5 trigger types, sms_logs IDB+cloud); SMS triggers in students.js (fee due), attendance.js (absent), exam.js (result), payment-engine.js (approve/reject); SMS Settings tab in Settings panel with API key config, per-event toggles, test SMS, log viewer; Student Portal Routine tab added (student-dashboard.js + student-portal.html); class_routines + sms_logs added to supabase-sync TABLE_COLUMNS.
